prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2024年最低位次分别为约2885名→2871名→2594名→6262名。2021–2023年位次稳定在2600–2900名区间，2024年因扩招（5人→8人）及声誉偏负面等因素，位次 大幅后移至6262名，降幅约3670名。2025年位次，未纳入直接计算；2021–2024年本省理科计划分别为6人、5人、5人、8人；2026年物理类计划 大幅扩招至13人，较2024年增加5人，增幅62.5%。2025年计划，按2024年8人估算。大幅扩招意味着更多考生有机会被录取，但位次竞争方向需结合供需弹性综合判断。 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科2026年主榜第28名（大连理工大学主校排名，盘锦校区共享），近年排名稳定在28–32名区间，学校层次高、品牌效应 强。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 2024年声誉评价偏负面（投档线异常），2026年声誉评价仍偏负面（录取断档或投档线异常）；抖音热度为「较热」（总排名第55位），短视频曝光量中等 偏上，反映报考关注度尚可。历史投档异常信号可能对报考心理产生一定滞后影响；共享大连理工大学主校学科评估结果：化学工程与技术A+、力学A、土木工 程A、工商管理A、机械工程A、管理科学与工程A、软件工程A等。盘锦校区招生专业以能源化学工程（化工类）、经济学类为主，与主校优势学科关联紧密，学科实力对考生有较 强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年招生专业包括能源化学工程（7人）、生物信息学（2人）、生物制造（2人）、经济学类（2人）。化工类专业社会热度平稳偏热，经济 学类热度分化观望。本省2026年总考生约48000人（不确定标记），较2025年物理类30457人明显增加，竞争加剧。；该校位于辽宁省盘锦市，距青海省较远，跨省就读的地域偏好对青海考生报考意愿有一定抑制作用，但985/211层次仍具吸 引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2024年位次大幅后移的基数效应、2026年招生计划大幅扩招（13人 vs 2024年8人）带来的供需弹性变化、本省考生规模增加以及声誉偏负面等因素。预计2026年最低录取位次约7749名，较2024年6262名略有 后移（位次数字增大），反映扩招带来的竞争结构变化及考生规模增加的综合影响。位次区间7249–8249名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 经济学类（经济与商务实验班）
- 能源化学工程（含能源化学工程、化学工程与工业生物工程）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 生物信息学
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 生物制造
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间7249–8249名内，建议以二档生物信息学为主攻、一档经济学类/能源化学工程为冲刺、三档生物制造为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<7249名）可重点冲刺一档 王牌专业能源化学工程（化工A+）。位次接近区间上限（>8249名）建议以三档保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the minimum rankings were approximately 2885 → 2871 → 2594 → 6262. From 2021 to 2023, rankings were stable in the 2600–2900 range. In 2024, due to enrollment expansion (from 5 to 8 students) and negative reputation, the ranking dropped significantly to 6262, a decrease of about 3670 places. The 2025 ranking is not directly included in calculations. From 2021 to 2024, the provincial science enrollment plans were 6, 5, 5, and 8 students respectively. In 2026, the physics category plan expands significantly to 13 students, an increase of 5 students from 2024, a 62.5% increase. The 2025 plan is estimated based on the 2024 figure of 8 students. Significant expansion means more students have the opportunity to be admitted, but the direction of ranking competition needs to be judged in combination with supply and demand elasticity. It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science ranking, it is 28th in the main list (Dalian University of Technology main campus ranking, shared by Panjin Campus), with recent rankings stable in the 28–32 range. The university has a high level and strong brand effect.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2024, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (abnormal admission scores). In 2026, the reputation evaluation remains somewhat negative (admission gaps or abnormal scores). Douyin popularity is 'relatively hot' (ranked 55th overall), with medium-to-high short video exposure, reflecting moderate attention from applicants. Historical abnormal admission signals may have a lagging psychological impact on applicants. It shares the discipline evaluation results of Dalian University of Technology main campus: Chemical Engineering and Technology A+, Mechanics A, Civil Engineering A, Business Administration A, Mechanical Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Software Engineering A, etc. The Panjin Campus enrolls students mainly in Energy Chemical Engineering (chemical engineering category) and Economics, which are closely related to the main campus's advantageous disciplines. The strength of these disciplines has a strong appeal to applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the enrollment majors include Energy Chemical Engineering (7 students), Bioinformatics (2 students), Biomanufacturing (2 students), and Economics (2 students). The social popularity of chemical engineering majors is stable to slightly hot, while economics majors show divided and wait-and-see attitudes. The total number of provincial examinees in 2026 is about 48,000 (uncertain mark), a significant increase compared to 30,457 physics category examinees in 2025, intensifying competition. The university is located in Panjin City, Liaoning Province, far from Qinghai Province. The regional preference for cross-province study has a certain inhibitory effect on the willingness of Qinghai applicants, but the 985/211 level still has appeal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the base effect of the significant ranking drop in 2024, the supply-demand elasticity changes due to the large enrollment expansion in 2026 (13 students vs. 8 in 2024), the increase in the number of provincial examinees, and the negative reputation, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will be approximately 7749, slightly lower than the 2024 ranking of 6262 (ranking number increases), reflecting the comprehensive impact of enrollment expansion on competition structure and the increase in examinee numbers. The ranking range is 7249–8249.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Economics (Economics and Business Experimental Class)
- Energy Chemical Engineering (including Energy Chemical Engineering, Chemical Engineering and Industrial Bioengineering)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 7249–8249, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Bioinformatics as the main target, aim for Tier 1 Economics/Energy Chemical Engineering as a stretch, and use Tier 3 Biomanufacturing as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<7249), you can focus on reaching for the top Tier 1 flagship major Energy Chemical Engineering (Chemical Engineering A+). If your ranking is near the upper limit (>8249), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 as a safety.
